text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. It's nice to see the students going<n>about
their daily lives with such vigor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, my presence seems to have<n>put some
on edge.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand, but I do wish they'd find<n>me more
approachable...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should take a page from Fuji<n>Kiseki.
Learning magic tricks might<n>soften my image.
